channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned bin and litter, 21st April
item.description:
Behind greenery on side pavement on Victoria Grove by junction with Beatty

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous railing, 21st April
item.description:
Rusty sharp spikes bended towards the footpath, quite dangerous if someone slips

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ennis Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 21st April
item.description:
No option for regular bike on app

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Kennington Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole, wider than the size of an average cars tire, 21st April
item.description:
I have just driven over the pot hole, it is big and deep enough that my entire tire got stuck in the hole and made my car go in to SOS mode (hazards automatically went off) and jolted my car in to the other lane. I thought I was going to crash as I entered the roundabout. It is so dangerous especially as it’s coming off a road that is 50MPH
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Byron Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncollected bins for 2 weeks now on street, 21st April
item.description:
Over flowing uncollected bins for 2 wees now on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queen Elizabeths Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green space., 21st April
item.description:
Please remove the green space and let everyone by the green space to have a potential driveway because it’s getting ridiculous. Come after 5pm the path and road is booked up with cars and no one can park anywhere. Not even outside their own house and people are forced to walk into the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ockham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist stickers being placed around Northumberland heath, 21st April
item.description:
I have seen some incredibly offensive stickers being placed in the Northumberland heath area - telling immigrants to ‘remigrate’
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ron Green Court, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in the box junction on Westmoreland road and |Aylesbury road BR2 0QL, 21st April
item.description:
Huge pothole in the yellow box which is hidden by the box.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aylesbury Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concern About Vehicle Parked on Public Road, 21st April
item.description:
I would like to raise a concern about a vehicle that has been left parked on Ickleton road I am not certain whether the vehicle has been abandoned, but it has remained in the same place for a month and I wanted to bring it to your attention so it can be checked if appropriate. The vehicle appears to have expired MOT and does not appear to have insurance showing on the public records.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ickleton Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crashed Car, 21st April
item.description:
Crashed Jaguar car has not been moved after a month now. This is unsightly and also dangerous as fluids are leaking into the marina.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filter on the green man pedestrian light has moved, 21st April
item.description:
The filter on the green man pedestrian light has been moved so when you are standing at the crossing you can't see the green man! It's too high for me to reach to be able to move it back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bikes, 21st April
item.description:
These two bikes have been locked to this pole and left since the 4th of April. Parts are disappearing every day, they don't have wheels anymore...

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blithdale Road, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on Brecknock Road, 21st April
item.description:
The potholes on Brecknock Road has not been fixed for over a month. It is on the majority of Brecknock Road (from Archway Station to Hilldrop Crescent)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Quantity of Household Waste, 21st April
item.description:
Large amount of household waste placed outside over approx. 1 month period. Result of DIY/home improvement works. Individual is continually adding to the amount of refuse pictured, started small approx 1 month ago, now a much higher quantity of waste. Pile of refuse is growing without clarity on collection, etc. Refuse not placed in a skip, for example. Refuse is located in small annex to left of neighbourhood entryway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Capstan Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 21st April
item.description:
Car has been left in total disrepair for several months & number plates have been removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Remove, 21st April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa on pavement / road., 21st April
item.description:
Unacceptable been there over 3:weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The mattress, 21st April
item.description:
The mattress has been left abandoned for over two weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lansdowne Mews, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches broken, 21st April
item.description:
They need removing, one is low over the road, outside. 58 Thank yku

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reverdy Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing bins and rubbish, 21st April
item.description:
Over flowing bins and rubbish. This is a weekly problem. Can be something be done!!?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119D, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
